Health.headline: Patients have ended up in the ER after quitting prescribed medication due to false health claims seen on social media
Health.source: WTOP News / U.S. News & World Report

Health.headline: PAHO published guidance helping journalists identify and counter vaccine misinformation
Outbreaks of measles, meningitis and RSV have risen in the US as vaccination rates decline amid health misinformation
Health.source: Cook County Department of Public Health

Health.headline: A global survey found public confidence in making health decisions dropped as health misinformation spreads
An analysis found popular AI chatbots confidently gave inaccurate medical information on topics like cancer and vaccines
A US Surgeon General advisory warned that health misinformation has led people to decline vaccines and try unproven treatments
A Canadian Medical Association survey found most respondents had encountered false or misleading health information on social media
WHO highlighted how AI-driven algorithms are amplifying health misinformation among adolescents on vaccination and reproduction topics

Finance.headline: Guides warn that guaranteed returns and requests for private keys or seed phrases are major red flags of crypto scams
Analysts flagged crypto projects promising steady daily or monthly profits as likely Ponzi schemes dressed up with AI branding
An updated warning list identified several fraudulent AI-powered crypto trading platforms circulating online
A report named pig-butchering and deepfake impersonation scams among the biggest crypto threats of 2026
Chainalysis's 2026 Crypto Crime Report estimated roughly $17 billion was lost to crypto scams in 2025
Fake investment platforms and phishing links remain the most common ways users lose money to crypto scams
A credit union warned that phrases like 'AI-powered wealth automation' are often used to disguise fake crypto investment schemes
